name: Chicken Broccoli Orientale
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless, skinless chicken (thighs or breasts, cut into strips)
1 medium Green or sweet red pepper, cut into 1-inch squares
10 1/4 oz Campbell's Cream of Broccoli Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat, heat the oil. Cook the chicken half at a time until browned.
2. Add the onion and peppers. Cook for 5 minutes or until the vegetables are tender-crisp.
3. Stir in the soup, water, and soy sauce. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce the heat to low. Cover, and simmer for 5 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
5. Serve over rice. Makes 4 servings.
